title: Municipal administrator, attorney receive ‘exemplary’ reviews from Sitka Assembly
summary: The Sitka Assembly gave the city’s municipal administrator and attorney both “exemplary” reviews for their work over the past year in a special meeting Tuesday night (4-21-26).
